summary: Test `test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` failed due to repeated 502 errors from github.com when attempting to download a test package. The error shows HTTPSConnectionPool hitting max retries after receiving multiple 502 gateway error responses.
root_cause: Transient GitHub.com server errors (502 Bad Gateway) causing pip install to fail when downloading from https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip. The test was rerun 3 times but consistently encountered the same network error.

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: Explicit error message showing 502 gateway errors from github.com preventing package download
Test was rerun 3 times, all encountering the same network error, indicating a persistent transient issue
pip command exited with error code 1 due to the network failure

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job. This is a transient network failure from GitHub's servers (502 errors), not a code issue. If failures persist, consider adding longer retry delays or exponential backoff for network-dependent tests.
